reviews.author: Elwis Lopez
reviews.review_body:
If you are looking for a holistic school that provides all round growth for your child, then Amity Global School is the right fit.
- Its culturally diverse in student and teacher profile.
- The teaching profile is all inclusive and provides a curriculum that fosters child's growth and development.
- They host occupational therapy services that helps in an integrated approach for children that may benefit.
- Development of emotional needs in children in this age is crucial and the counseling program helps a ton.
- Education in a creative way helps the child grow inquisitiveness, autonomy and decision making skills.
- Sports and extracurricular activities add to the child's growth and developmental health.
I assure Amity Global School is the best option; all in one go.

reviews.author: Richa Nigam
reviews.review_body: Amity Global School provided us with excellent education . The faculty was supportive, and the overall environment of the school os great . My child has grown tremendously . There is overall development in the kids.

reviews.author: Ekkta Gupta
reviews.review_body: I am really happy how my kid confidently performs in school. Thanks to Amity global .

reviews.author: Pankhuri Sinha
reviews.review_body: My daughter has started her formal schooling and loves it here. I see a lot of positive changes in her.

reviews.author: Nidhi Baghel
reviews.review_body: Excellent school.. every one from the staff to classroom teachers .. are so cooperative and concerned about our child’s growth  and their overall development.. !! We have seen lot of progress in our child .

reviews.author: Mom&All
reviews.review_body: It's an amazing school with international board learning pedagogy, we are really happy to send our twinies here, all the teachers are very good, sumati mam is an amazing loving teacher for EY2.

reviews.author: Sameer Srivastava
reviews.review_body: Wonderful school with talented teachers who always support and guide extra mile.

reviews.author: paul choudhary
reviews.review_body:
The school provides a well-balanced environment for academic and personal growth. The teachers are dedicated, ensuring that students receive quality education along with strong moral values. The curriculum is well-structured, and there is a good mix of academics and extracurricular activities.

Teachers are very good.

reviews.author: Garima Sachdeva
reviews.review_body: School is good, teachers are vry co operative , the school should focus on the transporation as there is no transportation from east delhi to noida…
